assignments.description: Assign the EDU Opp found to the WorkingOpp Variable to update the opportunity later in the flow.
assignments.name: Assign
assignments.label: Assign to Working Opp Record - EDU

assignments.description: Assign the Assessment Opp found to the WorkingOpp Variable to update the opportunity later in the flow.
assignments.name: Assign_to_Working_Opp_Record_Assessment
assignments.label: Assign to Working Opp Record - Assessment

assignments.name: Update_Opp_All_Call_Date_Fields
assignments.label: Update Opp - All Call & Date Fields

decisions.name: Already_Captured_Task_Data_on_Opp
decisions.label: Already Captured Task Data on Opp

rules.name: Need_to_Capture_Data
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR (2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5) OR (6 AND 7)
rules.label: Need to Capture Data

decisions.description: Verify whether the Assignee Role includes "Education" to ensure the correct opportunity is identified.
decisions.name: Check_Assignee_Role
decisions.label: Check Assignee Role

rules.name: Found_Opp_Continue
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR ((2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND 6 AND 7 AND 8)
rules.label: Found Opp - Continue

Flow.description: Process to link Sales Tasks (Calls, Emails, SMS) to an open Opportunity. Drives off of the creation or update of an Activity depending on the LOGIC Is Sales Call 04-03-25 - BW - Added Opp Child Rec Types to Get Potential Opp query 06-02-25 - BW - Removed the limitation for only Sales-related Tasks. Will run for any task creation 06-02-25 - BW - Updated triggering criteria to only run on certain scenarios instead of every task update 10-06-2025 - LK - Include EDU and Billing Upsell 11-03-2025 - LK - Checking to see opp is open or closed

formulas.name: formNumberOfZoomCalls

Flow.label: Sales Funnel - Held Task Handler

recordLookups.description: The first preference is to relate the EDU Task to the EDU Opp. If no EDU Opp is available, then check for an Assessment opportunity and link the task to that opportunity.
recordLookups.name: Get_Assessment_Opp
recordLookups.label: Get Assessment Opp

recordLookups.description: Because the Assigned to ID User's role name contains "Customer Account Specialist, Education" or "Upsell Sales Specialist, Education," it means it's an EDU Task that needs to be assigned to an EDU Opportunity.
recordLookups.name: Get_Potential_EDU_Opp_by_Owner
recordLookups.label: Get Potential EDU Opp by Owner

recordLookups.name: Get_Potential_Opps
recordLookups.label: Get Potential Opps
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 12 AND (4 OR ((2 OR 3 OR 10 OR 11) AND ((5 AND 9) OR 6 OR 7 OR 8)))

recordLookups.name: Get_Potential_Opps_by_Opp_Owner
recordLookups.label: Get Potential Opps by Opp Owner
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 11 AND (3 OR ((4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9 AND 10))

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Update_Task_to_Relate_to_Found_Opp
recordUpdates.label: Update Task to Relate to Found Opp

recordUpdates.name: Update_Task_to_Relate_to_Found_Opp
recordUpdates.label: Update Task to Relate to Found Opp

recordUpdates.description: Update the EDU Task with the Assessment opportunity that was found.
recordUpdates.name: Update_the_Assessment_Task
recordUpdates.label: Update the Assessment Task

recordUpdates.description: Update the EDU Task with the EDU opportunity that was found.
recordUpdates.name: Update_the_EDU_Task
recordUpdates.label: Update the EDU Task
